title: Replace and refit steering, suspension and braking system components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Replace and refit steering, suspension and braking system components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to replace and refit steering, suspension or braking system component

pcs.text: Determine job requirements according to workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with work tasks, assess potential risks and implement control measures according to workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify components requiring servicing, and select tools and equipment according to job requirements1.5 Check tools and equipment for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements according to workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with work tasks, assess potential risks and implement control measures according to workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify components requiring servicing, and select tools and equipment according to job requirements1.5 Check tools and equipment for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements according to workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with work tasks, assess potential risks and implement control measures according to workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify components requiring servicing, and select tools and equipment according to job requirements1.5 Check tools and equipment for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to replace and refit steering, suspension or braking system component

elements.title: Inspect and replace system component

pcs.text: Inspect faulty components and determine solutions to restore component functionality2.2 Select solution and prepare tools and equipment to restore component functionality2.3 Replace component according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect faulty components and determine solutions to restore component functionality2.2 Select solution and prepare tools and equipment to restore component functionality2.3 Replace component according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect faulty components and determine solutions to restore component functionality2.2 Select solution and prepare tools and equipment to restore component functionality2.3 Replace component according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect and replace system component

elements.title: Refit and test system component

pcs.text: Prepare replaced system component, tools and equipment for vehicle refitting3.2 Refit system component according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements, without causing damage to vehicle3.3 Conduct post-refit testing of system functionality and rectify faults where required according to OEM procedures3.4 Conduct final inspection and confirm vehicle is ready for use according to road safety standards and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare replaced system component, tools and equipment for vehicle refitting3.2 Refit system component according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements, without causing damage to vehicle3.3 Conduct post-refit testing of system functionality and rectify faults where required according to OEM procedures3.4 Conduct final inspection and confirm vehicle is ready for use according to road safety standards and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare replaced system component, tools and equipment for vehicle refitting3.2 Refit system component according to workplace procedures, manufacturer specifications and safety requirements, without causing damage to vehicle3.3 Conduct post-refit testing of system functionality and rectify faults where required according to OEM procedures3.4 Conduct final inspection and confirm vehicle is ready for use according to road safety standards and safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Refit and test system component

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Clean work area, collect recyclable material and dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials4.2 Store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Document vehicle safety inspection and system component installation process according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean work area, collect recyclable material and dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials4.2 Store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Document vehicle safety inspection and system component installation process according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean work area, collect recyclable material and dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials4.2 Store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.3 Document vehicle safety inspection and system component installation process according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
